title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); import models, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android compatibility and fluent builder APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat, generate, and embed with idiomatic Ruby syntax.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama REST endpoints with fzf model picker and chat REPL.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s sidebar chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# .NET client for Ollama with async IEnumerable streaming and nullable reference types.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama; cross-platform, single executable, no browser needed.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat/completions inside no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension that adds a chat panel and slash commands powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama + SentenceTransformers + Chroma in a single Python notebook.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service for CI pipelines to test LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat/embed endpoints for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: ollama discord bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.
